sentences.arabic: أَرْسَلَتِ الأُمُّ ابْنَهَا لِشِرَاءِ الخُبْزِ مِنَ الفُرْنِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je poslala sina da kupi hljeb iz pekare.
sentences.translationEn: The mother sent her son to buy bread from the bakery.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَتْهُ عَشَرَةَ دَرَاهِمَ وَطَلَبَتْ ثَلَاثَةَ أَرْغِفَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Dala mu je deset dirhema i tražila tri hljeba.
sentences.translationEn: She gave him ten dirhams and asked for three loaves.

sentences.translation: Otišao je i kupio hljebove i uzeo ostatak.
sentences.translationEn: He went and bought the loaves and took the change.

sentences.arabic: عَادَ إِلَى البَيْتِ وَأَعْطَى الأُمَّ الخُبْزَ وَالباقِيَ.
sentences.translation: Vratio se kući i dao majci hljeb i kusur.
sentences.translationEn: He returned home and gave his mother the bread and the change.
